name: Doushen (Beijing) Education & Technology INC.
summary: Doushen (Beijing) Education & Technology INC. provides education and information security services in China. It offers education cloud platforms, smart campus solutions and disciplinary application products in the field of K12 that target B-end users; and college entrance exam consulting services, overseas education consulting services, and online tutoring that target C-end users. The company's information security business include data security solutions, such as full data lifecycle, and industrial control security products and solutions, as well as autonomous and controllable products and solutions targeting various industries. It also provides education services for schools and educational institutions at various levels, including top-level design, consulting planning, curriculum construction, big data analysis, software development, educational resources and model research, and education; and space development, hardware support, system integration, and operation and maintenance outsourcing services. In addition, the company offers artificial intelligence technology solutions consisting of emotion calculation, identity recognition, natural language understanding, and other intelligent classroom teaching analysis; various solutions and technical services for offline classroom teaching, online one-to-one teaching, and professional scenes. The company was formerly known as Beijing Lanxum Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Doushen (Beijing) Education & Technology INC. in August 2020. Doushen (Beijing) Education & Technology INC. was founded in 1999 and is based in Beijing, China.
